prevalence.trend: stable; higher in men and HIV patients

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; chronic pruritus and QOL impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis of erythematous, greasy scaling in seborrheic areas

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with topical therapy and maintenance

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in primary care and dermatology
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Medicated shampoos (ketoconazole), topical antifungals and corticosteroids; maintenance therapy
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Recurrence and adherence to maintenance therapy
